description: The first holocard set. One card per default agent — all of class Agent. Cast a card to invoke its bound agent through your brainstem's /chat. Simplest mechanic; a foundation for richer sets.

cards.name: Total Recall
cards.tagline: Pulls every related memory you've ever stored.
cards.prompt: Use ContextMemory to surface every memory you have related to my current focus. Group by theme. Highlight contradictions.

cards.name: Headlines
cards.tagline: Top stories on Hacker News, summarized.
cards.prompt: Use HackerNews to get the top 5 stories right now. One sentence per story — what it is and why it matters.

cards.name: Daybrief
cards.tagline: Tight bullets, no preamble. Plan, recap, prep.
cards.prompt: Daybrief mode. Tight bullets, no paragraphs. What did I do yesterday, what's the focus today, what's the one thing that must ship.

cards.name: Curate
cards.prompt: Use ManageMemory to audit my memory store. Propose three sets of changes: (1) deletions of stale or duplicated memories, (2) merges of fragments that belong together, (3) elevations of patterns worth promoting to constitution.

cards.name: Synthesis
cards.tagline: Triangulate everything you know across all my memory.
cards.prompt: Use LearnNew to triangulate everything you know about the topic I'll name next, drawing from every memory at your disposal. Lead with the load-bearing claim. Cite which memories support which claims.

cards.name: Convergence
cards.prompt: Use SwarmFactory to spawn 5 specialist agents converging on the open question I'll name next. Run two cycles. Return the converged answer plus a one-line dissent log.

cards.name: Chapter Strike
cards.tagline: Five-persona pipeline. One chapter back per call.
cards.prompt: Use BookFactory to draft a chapter from the source material I'll paste next. Walk it through Writer → Editor → CEO → Publisher → Reviewer. Return the final chapter plus the dissent log.
